message:
perf(vdbe): add BTREE_APPEND vs seek instrumentation counters (bd-7vkes)

Add FSQLITE_VDBE_INSERT_APPEND_COUNT and FSQLITE_VDBE_INSERT_SEEK_COUNT
atomic counters to measure how often the append fast path fires vs
full B-tree seek during INSERT operations.

Verified that cursor position IS preserved between MakeRecord and
Insert opcodes (invalidate_storage_cursor_row_cache only clears
decoded column cache, not cursor page position or append hint).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
